description: A geotechnical engineer maps the structural features (e.g., joints, faults) on a newly exposed pit wall or underground tunnel face.

nodes.task_description: Take high-resolution photos of the rock face using photogrammetry.

expected_outcome.value: A 3D model of the rock face is created from the photos.

nodes.task_description: On the 3D model, identify and trace the major structural features.

expected_outcome.value: All significant geological structures are digitized.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the orientation of the structures to assess the risk of rockfalls or wedge failures and update the ground support design if needed.

expected_outcome.value: The stability of the rock face is assessed, and the support plan is confirmed or updated.
